Such tactics violate international humanitarian law and endanger civilians, as they turn civilian objects into military targets. The ensuing Russian strikes in populated areas have killed civilians and destroyed civilian infrastructure. '''''https://www.amnesty.org/en/latest/news/2022/08/ukraine-ukrainian-fighting-tactics-endanger-civilians/ I see no mention of this in article kindly add. [[User:My very best wishes|My very best wishes]] ([[User talk:My very best wishes|talk]]) 23:46, 13 November 2023 (UTC) == Erroneous image description == The second image notes how "Arabs" are using the ambulance and as human shield. 1) a vehicle isn't human, 2) the original image source describes how a detainee not pictured was being used as a human shield by IDF forces, not "Arabs" pictured [[User:Djsiilver|SiiLv3R]] ([[User talk:Djsiilver|talk]]) 03:50, 18 April 2024 (UTC) == [[WP:BRD|BRD]] == I made an edit to this article that says "(can also be referred to as a "meat shield")" and it was reverted. To prevent edit-warring I am proposing that we put this sentence back into the article. My argument for putting this in is that meat shields are a term that is used, I did not know that it was used in a video-game context but nonetheless they refer to the same thing, living organisms being used as a deterrence for attacks. Additionally video game context outside a meat shield is at face value, a human shield. Due to the ''somewhat'' high usage of this term, I propose it be added to the article. [[User:ContentiousTopicsEditor|ContentiousTopicsEditor]] ([[User talk:ContentiousTopicsEditor|talk]]) 19:05, 4 March 2025 (UTC) :I would like to see some references that use the phrase, outside of the gaming community, and is in common usage. On a personal level, I am not aware of the phrase used much (if at all) outside of the community although that's just me. I guess it could be referenced in its own section along with references. I would still object to its use in the lede as the main purpose of the article is about its use in real life combat situations. :Also, thank you for not edit warring and using the tp instead.
